mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainer_pricing (trainer_id, label, session_count, price, is_popular) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{label}, #{sessionCount}, #{price}, #{popular})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id AS trainerId, label, session_count AS sessionCount, price, is_popular AS popular, is_active AS active FROM trainer_pricing WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY session_count ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainer_availability (trainer_id, day_of_week, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id AS trainerId, day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, is_active AS active FROM trainer_availability WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(day_of_week, 'MON','TUE','WED','THU','FRI','SAT','SUN')
